BottleneckSummaryText: City B's refined_mana line can only restart quickly if a heavy shard haul breaks out of Beta's raider vault.
OpportunityReasonText: Dungeon Beta's Greedy Path is City B's fastest expedition lever when stalled processing matters more than recovery comfort.
RecommendationRationaleText: Use the Greedy Path when City B needs the biggest shard return now and can absorb a rougher follow-up dispatch after the raid.
WhyCityMattersText: City B matters because a single vault haul can restart processing immediately, but overspending the party here can choke the next run.
